TextView.android:text:
Motivation Boosters

1. Set Clear Goals
Know what you want and write it down.

2. Celebrate Small Wins
Every step forward is progress worth celebrating.

3. Surround Yourself with Positivity
Spend time with people who inspire and uplift you.

4. Visualize Success
Picture yourself achieving your goals every morning.

5. Read Inspirational Quotes
A powerful quote can shift your mindset instantly.

6. Take Breaks When Needed
Rest is part of the journey, not a setback.

7. Track Your Progress
Seeing how far you have come keeps you going.

8. Learn from Failure
Every failure is a lesson that brings you closer to success.

9. Create a Vision Board
Visual reminders of your goals keep you focused.

10. Believe in Yourself
Self-confidence is the foundation of all achievement.
